## Personal Context

At session start, read `CLAUDE.alex-vinckier.md` from this repo root, where
`<username>` = `git config user.name` lowercased with spaces replaced by
hyphens. Also read `CLAUDE.<username>.history.md` from the repo root and
from the current working folder if either file exists. At session end,
append a dated entry to the history file in the current working folder,
or to the repo root history file if the work spanned multiple folders.

Also read `WORKPLAN.md` from this repo root if it exists. The workplan
contains prioritized tasks with titles, descriptions, and time estimates
formatted for YouTrack. Use it to understand upcoming work and priorities.
